# Copilot Instructions

Follow the repo-wide rules in `AGENTS.md`.

Use the relevant skill file before changing design-system workflow code:

- End-to-end workflow: `agents/SKILL.md`
- Product principles: `agents/product-principles.SKILL.md`
- Design intake: `agents/design-intake.SKILL.md`
- Component schema: `agents/component-schema.SKILL.md`
- Component mapping: `agents/component-mapping.SKILL.md`
- Review UI: `agents/review-ui.SKILL.md`
- GraphQL API: `agents/graphql-api.SKILL.md`
- Instrumentation: `agents/instrumentation.SKILL.md`
- Compliance output: `agents/compliance-review.SKILL.md`
- React Shoelace integration: `agents/react-shoelace-integration.SKILL.md`
- AI service boundary: `agents/ai-service-boundary.SKILL.md`
- Docs: `agents/docs-writing.SKILL.md`
- Production readiness: `agents/production-readiness.SKILL.md`

Keep examples public-safe and generic. Run the appropriate package scripts before finishing.
